sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 뉴몬트는 2025년 73억 달러의 기록적인 잉여현금흐름을 달성하고, 자본 배분 프레임워크 강화 및 배당금 인상을 발표했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 연간 73억 달러의 기록적인 잉여현금흐름을 창출하며 재무 상태를 강화했습니다.
강화된 자본 배분 프레임워크를 도입하고 4분기 주당 배당금을 0.26달러로 인상했습니다.
부채를 34억 달러 감축하여 연말 기준 21억 달러의 순현금 상태를 달성했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 비핵심 자산 매각 프로그램을 완료하여 총 45억 달러의 세후 수익을 확보했습니다.
2025년 핵심 포트폴리오에서 570만 온스의 금을 생산하며 연간 생산 및 비용 가이던스를 달성했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 연간 조정 순이익은 76억 달러(주당 6.89달러), 조정 EBITDA는 135억 달러를 기록했습니다.
영업활동 현금흐름은 103억 달러를 기록했으며, 연말 기준 총 유동성은 116억 달러입니다.

watchItems.text: 향후 컨퍼런스콜에서 2026년 가이던스 달성을 위한 마진 확대 전략과 구체적인 운영 효율화 계획을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 newmontq42025earningsand20.htm EX-99.1 Document NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM Exhibit 99.1 Newmont Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results, Provides 2026 Guidance, and Announces Enhanced Capital Allocation Framework DENVER, February 19, 2026 – Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) (Newmont or the Company) today announced its fourth quarter and full year 2025 results, declared a fourth quarter dividend of $0.26 1 and provided guidance for the full year of 2026. "2025 was a milestone year for Newmont, as we delivered on our full-year guidance, strengthened our financial position and made meaningful progress on our commitments. As a result of our disciplined operational execution, we delivered a record $7.3 billion in free cash flow, generated $3.6 billion from portfolio optimization, returned $3.4 b  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.3 billion = 73억 달러; $3.6 billion = 36억 달러; $3.4 billion = 34억 달러; $0.26 = 0.26달러; $7.3 = 7.3달러; $3.6 = 3.6달러; $3.4 = 3.4달러.

closed the year in a strong net cash position," said Natascha Viljoen, Newmont's President and Chief Executive Officer. "Building on this momentum, we announced an enhanced capital allocation framework and increased our quarterly dividend, anchored by a flexible and resilient balance sheet, and are entering 2026 with a clear focus on continuing to drive margin expansion and generate robust free cash flow from our unrivaled portfolio of world-class operations and projects." 2025 Results ▪ Achieved full-year production and cost guidance with production of 5.7 million attributable gold ounces from Newmont's core portfolio, for a total of 5.9 million attributable gold ounces, as well as 28 million ounces of silver and 135 thousand tonnes of copper; gold by-produ  Normalized numeric aliases: 5.7 million = 570만 달러; 5.9 million = 590만 달러; 28 million = 2,800만 달러; $7.2 billion = 72억 달러; $1,358 = 1,358달러; $1,609 = 1,609달러; $7.2 = 7.2달러; 1,358 million = 13억 5,800만 달러; 1,609 million = 16억 900만 달러.

ANI) 2 of $7.6 billion or $6.89 per diluted share and Adjusted EBITDA 2 of $13.5 billion for the year, with fourth quarter ANI 2 of $2.8 billion or $2.52 per diluted share ▪ Generated $10.3 billion of cash from operating activities, net of working capital impacts of $210 million; reported an all-time annual record $7.3 billion in Free Cash Flow 2 for the year, including a record $2.8 billion in the fourth quarter ▪ Announced an enhanced capital allocation framework 3 creating a predictable pathway to per share dividend growth; declared an increased dividend of $0.26 per share of common stock for the fourth quarter of 2025 1 ▪ Returned $3.4 billion of capital to share  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.6 billion = 76억 달러; $13.5 billion = 135억 달러; $2.8 billion = 28억 달러; $10.3 billion = 103억 달러; $210 million = 2억 1,000만 달러; $7.3 billion = 73억 달러; $3.4 billion = 34억 달러; $3.6 billion = 36억 달러; $6.89 = 6.89달러; $210 = 210달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러; $7.3 = 7.3달러; $0.26 = 0.26달러; $3.4 = 3.4달러; $3.6 = 3.6달러.

n remains under the previously authorized programs of $6.0 billion 4 ▪ Reduced debt by $3.4 billion in 2025, ending the year in a net cash position of $2.1 billion 2 , with $7.6 billion in cash and $11.6 billion in total liquidity 5 ▪ Completed the non-core divestiture program, generating $4.5 billion in total after-tax proceeds to date from announced transactions, inclusive of $134 million from the sale of equity shares in Greatland Resources in January 2026 6 ▪ Declared total attributable gold reserves of 118.2 million ounces and resources of 148.7 million ounces 7 ; significant exposure to other metals, including 12.5 million tonnes of copper reserv  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.0 billion = 60억 달러; $3.4 billion = 34억 달러; $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; $7.6 billion = 76억 달러; $11.6 billion = 116억 달러; $4.5 billion = 45억 달러; $134 million = 1억 3,400만 달러; 118.2 million = 1억 1,820만 달러; 12.5 million = 1,250만 달러; $7.6 = 7.6달러; $3.4 = 3.4달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러; $11.6 = Readable Korean unit: 1억 4,870만 달러.
